response.justification: While Bogdan brings valuable geospatial expertise through GISCollective and experience with high-performance distributed systems at Dunnhumby, his C++ skills are severely outdated (last used 10 years ago at National Instruments). His recent 6 years have focused entirely on TypeScript/JavaScript and web development, not systems programming or data pipeline infrastructure. For a mid-senior role prioritizing modern C++ as the primary technology, the technical gap is too significant to bridge quickly, despite his demonstrated willingness to learn new domains.
strengths: Direct geospatial and GIS platform experience through GISCollective and Green Map projects, with proven ability to build and maintain complex mapping systems
Strong background with high-performance distributed systems at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second, demonstrating scale and reliability engineering
Consistent track record of software craftsmanship with TDD, testing-focused development, and willingness to rapidly acquire new technical domains
concerns: C++ development experience is 10 years outdated (last role in Dec 2014); no modern C++ commercial or open-source work in current decade
Recent 6 years entirely focused on JavaScript/TypeScript and full-stack web development, creating significant gap in systems programming and low-level performance optimization
GIS expertise is in data collection and mapping visualization, not in building routing data pipelines or navigation systems for real-time traffic integration
